name: Perverting Entangling Temptation
outcome: Now that you're fully engulfed in the Perpetuas' gooey forms, the purple temptress rides facing you, her hair-tendrils entangling your arms to force your hands to squeeze her plump ass, each downward swing of her waist sending a rippling pulse of unholy euphoria through your entire body while the obscene view of her jiggling ass holds your pleasure-addled gaze.|n|Trapped between her, the bed of slime, and the duo at your sides whispering mind-melting magically-infused words right into your ears, there is little you can do but dumbly swing your hips in time with the domineering purple slime who coos and giggles evilly while you sink deeper and deeper into her seductive control amid the wet jellowy impacts of sex.
miss: Now that you're fully engulfed in the Perpetuas' gooey forms, the purple temptress rides facing away from you, her hair-tendrils possessively reaching for your arms, but you manage to evade her lasso-like grab!
